reviews.review_msg: Excellent professor that really knows his material. Very helpful and provide relevant examples that are used in the tests. Work hard and you will be doing well in this class.

Kevin was a great prof, the best Ive had so far. He tests on his examples given in class, tests are fair. Can be a bit hard to understand at times due to accent, but he explains concepts well. Also answered my emails quickly. Sometimes if you have a question, he jumps through it a bit quick but overall, I wish he could teach the rest of my courses!
His course is a little bit difficult compared with the other courses which are the same level.Anyway,to study with him is challenging and students can really learn sth important.
